name: overview_design_to_ui_design
prompt: overview-design.mdとopenapi.yamlをもとにUI設計書を作成してください。
expected_behavior: Reads overview-design.md as the primary source.
Uses api-design.md or openapi.yaml when available to map UI actions to API operations.
Creates or updates ui-design.md near the source document.
Includes screen-by-screen specifications, UI states, validation, errors, and API mapping.
Does not implement frontend code unless explicitly asked.
